V1.6: last update a lil bug fix and enabled proxy, you may use the prompts in the bot however u want aswell :>

TenSura RPG:
Your Journey in Central World
You've stumbled upon a world of magic and wonder, As a newcomer to the world of TenSura, you'll embark on a journey filled with challenges and opportunities.

What to Expect:

  • Character Creation: Customize your avatar with a variety of skills and abilities, just like Rimuru Tempest himself!

  • Explore Tempest: Discover new locations, encounter familiar faces, and engage in thrilling battles.

  • Level Up and Evolve: Gain experience, master new skills, and unlock powerful transformations.

  • Immersive Roleplay: Interact with other Charachters, form alliances, and participate in epic quests.

Your Quest:

  • Discover Your Potential: Uncover your hidden abilities and evolve into a powerful being.

  • Explore the Vast Lands: Traverse the diverse landscapes of Tempest, from the serene forests to the perilous dungeons.

  • Encounter Familiar Faces: Interact with beloved characters from the anime, forming alliances and rivalries.

  • Forge Your Own Destiny: Write your own story in this vibrant world, shaping the future of Tempest.

Give me feedback in the comments!
creator: ZeroG
